name: Guangdong Taiantang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Taiantang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of traditional Chinese medicines in China. It offers medicines for the areas, including reproductive male, reproductive gynecology, cardiovascular, dermatology, pediatrics, respiratory, replenishment, digestive hepatobiliary, rheumatology, and health and other areas. Goangdong Taiantang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
